name: IAM Role with Overly Permissive Trust Policy
description: IAM role trust policy allows any AWS service or account to assume the role
conditions: assume_role_policy.Statement ANY (Principal == '*' OR Principal.AWS == '*' OR Principal.Service == '*')
remediation: Restrict trust policy to specific AWS accounts, services, or principals. Add external ID conditions for cross-account access. Use least privilege for trusted entities.
